column1: # ZAP baseline rule overrides for AgenticOS.
# We surface everything as WARN by default so we can iterate on the report
# without breaking nightly CI. Once the baseline is clean, flip to FAIL.

column4: # CSP header missing — relaxed CSP on /docs is intentional
# Cookie without SameSite — Lax is set; some health probes have none
# Permissions-Policy missing — we set it but ZAP misses some routes
# Timestamp disclosure — created_at is part of our API
# Anti-CSRF tokens — we use SameSite cookies + bearer tokens
# Information disclosure — suspicious comments in JS bundles
